profile.name: Suresh Balla
profile.objective: full stack developer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications, admin systems, payment workflows, and polished user interfaces.
profile.currentFocus: Shipping reliable web products for global teams.

config.title: Suresh Balla
config.subtitle: Software Engineer
config.tagline: Software engineer building scalable web platforms.
config.intro: I design and engineer dependable product experiences across admin systems, payment flows, localization platforms, and Supabase-backed applications.

config.title: This is what my colleagues say about me 💙

experience.description: Led a 15-member team to build and scale a global back-office app used by 15,000+ teachers and admins across 90+ countries.
achievements: Focused on architecture, feature delivery, and performance optimization using Next.js (Refine), Shadcn UI, Zustand, NestJS, message queues, and microservices.
Developed configurable course registration pages enabling dynamic content and flow customization, supporting 100,000+ participant registrations.
Built a reusable payment gateway integration module used by multiple Art of Living projects.
Built an internal translation management system using Supabase and JS for 90+ countries and 60+ languages, reducing localization turnaround time.
Built a unified fundraising wrapper that dynamically integrates multiple campaigns using configurable data.
Collaborated in the rapid development of the Art of Living US website, delivering optimized Next.js components within 48 hours.

experience.description: Built front-end features and developer tooling for Art of Living Digital on Pathfinder, a global CRM platform, and admin back-office applications.
achievements: Built production React UI for the Latin America back-office, translating 600+ Figma screens into reusable components.
Shipped 15+ reusable UI components that improved usability and consistent UI/UX for 5,000+ active admin users.
Built German Ashram Pickup Scheduler from a React web app to a React Native mobile app with real-time WebSocket updates and offline support.
Built Snapdrop, a Slack bot with Python scripts for automated database snapshots via SSH tunnels, adopted by all development teams.
Set up CI/CD pipelines with SonarQube and co-created a cross-service translations system serving 150+ locales.

projects.title: Bhagyalakshmi Future Gold
projects.description: A full-stack bilingual (English & Telugu) jewelry e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, wishlist, multi-step checkout with Razorpay payments, order tracking, admin dashboard with revenue analytics, and cross-platform mobile support via Capacitor. Features dual store modes (online e-commerce / offline catalog with WhatsApp).

projects.title: DevMarket
projects.description: A two-sided marketplace connecting clients with developers for freelance projects. Clients post projects with budgets and categories, developers browse and submit proposals, and both sides communicate through built-in messaging. Features role-based onboarding, real-time notifications, and Supabase-powered authentication.

projects.title: TexLedger
projects.description: A Tally-like accounting and inventory management system for textile wholesalers. Features journal-based double-entry accounting with strict debit-credit validation, stock tracking via movement events, voucher management (purchase, sales, receipt, payment), and financial reports including trial balance and profit/loss. Uses PostgreSQL functions for accounting logic and Row Level Security for company-level data isolation.

testimonials.quote: During his tenure as a full-time developer, Suresh consistently demonstrated strong technical acumen and a proactive approach to problem-solving. He thoroughly researches and understands complex tasks assigned to him, even when they are technically challenging or first-of-their-kind within the organization. Suresh enthusiastically embraces new challenges, navigates ambiguous requirements effectively, and ensures high-quality deliverables. Whenever he faces roadblocks, he reaches out for clarification or guidance, which reflects his commitment to accuracy and continuous learning. He actively participates in team discussions, contributes valuable insights, and brings integrity, diligence, and a collaborative spirit to every project. Suresh is not only hardworking but also a reliable and valuable addition to any software development team.
testimonials.name: Aman Budhraja

testimonials.quote: Suresh consistently demonstrates a strong commitment to understanding and executing the tasks assigned to him. During his tenure, he handled technically challenging assignments, often pioneering solutions in the organization. He approaches each task with enthusiasm and confidence, showing a clear trajectory of growth and adaptability. Incomplete or ambiguous technical requirements never hinder his progress; Suresh takes initiative to research, validate, and implement the right solutions. Whenever he encounters obstacles, he proactively seeks guidance and collaborates effectively, ensuring the delivery of high-quality, reliable results. He manages his time efficiently, delivering work that consistently meets or exceeds expectations. Suresh is an invaluable team member — actively contributing to discussions, bringing integrity and dedication to every project, and continuously striving for excellence. His strong technical acumen, coupled with a collaborative spirit, makes him a significant asset to any team.
testimonials.name: Arun Raj

testimonials.quote: During his tenure as a full-time developer, I witnessed Suresh's strengths. He is good at research and documentation, possesses strong communication skills, and never hesitates to share his suggestions. He has the patience to work on the minute details of any project. It was a great experience working with a teammate like him.
testimonials.name: Neeru Chaurasia
